'''ngahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:boku|boku]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-h-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:boku|boku]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ngahate|ngahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngahatesher|ngahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngahatesherĂ«m|ngahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngahatero|ngahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngahateshĂ«|ngahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngahateshĂ«m|ngahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingahatero|gokingahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingahateshĂ«|gokingahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingahateshĂ«m|gokingahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongahankerom|gongahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongahankeshĂ«|gongahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongahankeshĂ«m|gongahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongahankeya|gongahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngahaterom|ngahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngahatemu|ngahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngahateya|ngahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingahaterom|gokingahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingahatemu|gokingahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingahateya|gokingahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngahahate|ngahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngahahatesher|ngahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngahahatesherĂ«m|ngahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngahahatero|ngahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngahahateshĂ«|ngahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngahahateshĂ«m|ngahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingahahatero|gokingahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingahahateshĂ«|gokingahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingahahateshĂ«m|gokingahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongahahankerom|gongahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongahahankeshĂ«|gongahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongahahankeshĂ«m|gongahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongahahankeya|gongahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngahahaterom|ngahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngahahatemu|ngahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngahahateya|ngahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingahahaterom|gokingahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingahahatemu|gokingahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingahahateya|gokingahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngĂŠhĂŠte|ngĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngĂŠhĂŠtesher|ngĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|ngĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠhĂŠtero|ngĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|ngĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|ngĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠhĂŠtero|gokingĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokingĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokingĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongĂŠhĂŠnkerom|gongĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gongĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gongĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongĂŠhĂŠnkeya|gongĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠhĂŠterom|ngĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠhĂŠtemu|ngĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngĂŠhĂŠteya|ngĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠhĂŠterom|gokingĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokingĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingĂŠhĂŠteya|gokingĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngafhafte|ngafhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngafhaftesher|ngafhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafhaftesherĂ«m|ngafhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafhaftero|ngafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngafhafteshĂ«|ngafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafhafteshĂ«m|ngafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafhaftero|gokingafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingafhafteshĂ«|gokingafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafhafteshĂ«m|gokingafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongafhafnkerom|gongafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongafhafnkeshĂ«|gongafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafhafnkeshĂ«m|gongafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongafhafnkeya|gongafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafhafterom|ngafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafhaftemu|ngafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngafhafteya|ngafhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafhafterom|gokingafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafhaftemu|gokingafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingafhafteya|gokingafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
